title: Label My Items
description: Adds item labels, which can label items
body:
# Label My Items

A basic mod that adds the Item Label and the Eraser, which are used together to manage item labels.

Item labels appear in the tooltip of an item:

![A cake item in the inventory gui, with "Labels: for joe" in the tooltip.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddafe6c3ddbaa729eb58b5da4dd2df2081c6ed20.png)

To create a label, get an Item Label and right-click on it with a Name Tag. The created label will reflect the custom name of the Name Tag.

Item Labels can contain multiple labels, showing one per line in the tooltip.

The eraser removes all labels from an item.
